name: minni-multi-plugin
description: Local multi-target plugin bridge for Minni (Codex, Cursor, Claude Code, Gemini, KiloCode).

scripts.test: npm run build && npm run build:board-test && node --test --import ./tests/setup-env.mjs tests/*.test.mjs
scripts.coverage: npm run build:server && npm run build:board-test && node --test --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-lines=70 --test-coverage-functions=70 --test-coverage-branches=60 --import ./tests/setup-env.mjs tests/*.test.mjs
scripts.test:server: npm run build:server && npm run build:board-test && npm run build:frontend && node --test --import ./tests/setup-env.mjs tests/*.test.mjs
scripts.test:file: npm run build:server && npm run build:board-test && node --test --import ./tests/setup-env.mjs
scripts.smoke:status: npm run build && node dist/cli.js status
scripts.smoke:hook: npm run build && node dist/hook.js SessionStart < /dev/null
scripts.smoke:codex-hook: npm run build && node dist/codex-hook.js SessionStart < /dev/null
scripts.smoke:cursor-hook: npm run build && node dist/cursor-hook.js sessionStart < /dev/null
scripts.smoke:kilocode-hook: npm run build && node dist/kilocode-hook.js SessionStart < /dev/null
